overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic Japanese-inspired interior corridor with hanging paper lanterns and neon floor strips, then entering a dimly lit washroom area. The scene blends traditional architecture with cyberpunk neon elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic Japanese corridor with hanging paper lanterns and neon floor strips

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a neon-lit corridor with traditional paper lanterns suspended overhead

notable_agents.action: character with green hair looking at a handheld device, standing against the right wall
character in red outfit with back to camera, standing against the left wall

entered.detail: rows of illuminated traditional Japanese paper lanterns suspended from the ceiling
glowing cyan neon lines embedded in the floor along the corridor edges
dark wooden slatted wall panels with vertical lines
dark rectangular structural pedestal in the center of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Walking through a futuristic corridor adorned with traditional Japanese paper lanterns suspended overhead and cyan neon strips embedded in the floor. Two NPCs stand near the walls initially before the camera passes them, continuing down the narrow space toward a central pedestal.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit side corridor with wall-mounted lanterns

events.description: turns left from main lantern corridor into darker side passage with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: turning left into a darker corridor, leaving the main lantern-lit passage behind

entered.detail: square illuminated lanterns mounted on the corridor walls providing warm light
structural columns lining the sides of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: Turning left from the main corridor into a darker, narrower passage illuminated only by warm wall-mounted lanterns. The neon floor strips and overhead paper lanterns fade from view as the camera moves deeper into the dimly lit transitional space.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional Japanese washroom with sinks and tea ceremony display

events.description: enters washroom area with illuminated sinks and traditional decor
camera focuses on tea ceremony display and tilts upward to view hanging decoration

agents.ego_description: exploring the washroom interior, examining the sinks, artwork, and tea display details

entered.detail: white illuminated rectangular sinks with faucets mounted on the left wall
large abstract landscape painting mounted on the back wall
tall wooden cabinet with lattice doors against the left wall
traditional tea set with cast iron kettle and cups on illuminated white stands
decorative hanging elements suspended from the ceiling above the tea display

segments.scene_description: Entering a spacious washroom featuring illuminated white sinks, a large abstract painting, and traditional Japanese decor. The camera explores the room, examining the fixtures and finally focusing on a tea ceremony display with hanging utensils overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, neon-lit futuristic corridor into the quiet, dimly lit atmosphere of a traditional washroom. It begins by gliding past NPCs through a narrow space defined by suspended paper lanterns and cyan neon strips embedded in the floor. As the camera reaches a central pedestal, it turns left into a darker, tighter passage where the neon glow fades and is replaced by the soft light of warm wall-mounted lanterns. The scene then opens into a spacious washroom featuring illuminated white sinks and a large abstract painting, blending modern fixtures with traditional Japanese decor. Finally, the camera explores the room's interior before focusing on a tea ceremony display with utensils hanging overhead.
